title: pepito-911/research
summary: 🔍 Explore AI-generated research projects, showcasing code and insights created entirely by LLM tools like Claude Code.

title: raydenai/queen-protocol
summary: Queen Protocol v2.10.0 — Runtime enforcement bundle (colony-converge.sh + manifest-to-plan + shard timeout) + production-path mandatory Tier 0 + reviewer-class diversity. Grounded in Elev-W1 evidence: 0/5 reports passed §3 schema; 100x money bug caught at $0 by retroactive Tier 0. Ant orchestration: claude/kimi/codex/gemma4-local.

title: Chimdiiii/OpenMemory
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI with OpenMemory for long-term memory storage, recall, and explanation, using a unique cognitive architecture.

summary: 🧠 Build a RAG-driven chatbot to answer user questions using real-world knowledge from documents, focused on mental health and social policy in Indonesia.

summary: Open-source LLM knowledge platform: turn raw documents into a queryable RAG, an autonomous reasoning agent, and a self-maintaining Wiki.

title: The-Focus-AI/umwelten

title: denn-gubsky/loomcycle
summary: Lightweight multi-tenant agentic runtime in one Go sidecar. Owns the LLM tool-use loop across Anthropic, OpenAI, and   Ollama with native prompt-cache control, MCP tool dispatch, and per-tenant fairness. TypeScript and Python adapters over   HTTP+SSE. Powers JobEmber.

title: YASOLG/ml-bootcamp
summary: ⚡ Master machine learning in 10 days with this interactive, open-source bootcamp. Learn Python basics to production ML at no cost.

title: tomaszwi66/peeky
summary: See. Think. Help. A privacy-first desktop sidekick for Windows. Voice in, voice out, vision via screen capture or webcam. Works fully offline with local Ollama models.

title: ginkida/gokin
summary: A powerful CLI tool that brings AI assistance directly to your terminal. Gokin understands your codebase and helps with file operations, code search, shell commands, git workflows, task management, and more - all through natural language.

title: 4over7/SpeakOut
summary: Offline-first AI voice input for macOS. 8 ASR models + 6 cloud providers, AI polish via 12 LLMs, 11-language translation, flash notes, AI organize, AI debug, correction feedback. 598 tests, fully private.

title: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign
summary: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.

title: Cerid-AI/cerid-ai
